interface.longDescription:
Create, edit, and download professional PDFs with graphs and math notation without leaving ChatGPT.
Edit conversationally or use the built-in LaTeX editor, then download the final PDF instantly.

Example Prompts
	•	Teachers:
“Create a quadratic equations worksheet PDF with 10 questions and include an answer key.”
	•	Parents:
“Here is my daughter’s math exam. Create a math worksheet PDF with questions targeting her growth areas.”
	•	Students:
“Create a mock IB Physics exam PDF focused on kinematics.”
	•	Professors:
“Format this abstract and introduction into a two-column IEEE-style PDF. Add citation placeholders.”
	•	Professionals:
“Create a PDF résumé based on the following LinkedIn data.”
	•	Developers:
“Using the following LaTeX code, fix any errors and generate a PDF.”

No more copying LaTeX into external tools. You can now edit, recompile, and refine PDFs entirely within ChatGPT. Advanced users can open the PDF in full screen to manually edit and recompile the LaTeX—all in one place.

Key Features
	•	Natural language input – Just describe what you want to create
	•	LaTeX-powered formatting – Clean, professional math notation
	•	Instant PDF generation – Download your PDF in seconds
	•	Flexible viewing options – Full-screen, distraction-free PDF and LaTeX view
